title: Creative Edit Tools [Archived]
description: [Archived] Adds tools, commands, GUI(s) to improve building and destroying in Creative mode! (and survival-compatible)
body:
**oh my gosh i decided to deprecate it this early, im very sorry for uploading a new mod for it to be deprecated on its first version**


please read, mod downloaders

# About this mod
Creative Edit Tools (CET) is a mod that is similiar to (which you should check out) [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit), [Effortless Building](https://modrinth.com/mod/effortless-building), and supposedly to be integrated with [Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-utility) and [Command Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-tools). This mod is used to solve building issues in Creative mode.

# How do I use/play this mod?
While using the mod, you can ```Press B to open the simplifed mod GUI``` or run ``` /cet help <specify what help do you need> ```, you can also open the creative inventory at the creative tab named "CET/Creative Edit Items". The items are only obtainable via Creative and modifiable by a Level 4 Operator.

##  Are there modifications for this mod?
As of now (since it's just been released), there are no official/trusted modifications.
You can contact me if you would like to add your modification as a part of the list here!
